title: Left joins are not evaluated correctly  (in some cases)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE hastag_3 (subj Int32 NOT NULL, obj Int32 DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE hasgeography1_6 (subj Int32 NOT NULL, obj Int32 UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO hastag_3 (subj, obj) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 3), (3, 4);
SELECT h0.subj, h1.obj FROM hastag_3 AS h0 LEFT JOIN hasgeography1_6 AS h1 ON (h1.subj = h0.subj) WHERE h0.obj IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect evaluation of left joins in complex queries
